recent_evidence.summary: c02 CPMG N=8 six-average autosave sanity review: Bridge-free review of the running CPMG N=8 weak-13C discriminator at 6/12 averages. The six-average autosave is an even snake-order-balanced subset (300k/600k planned shots per point). Bridge stayed healthy/running with Final about 44.086 kcps, monitor active/no error, and stop_requested=false. No drift flags. Six-average readout3/self-baseline was 0.9850 near 0.650 us and 0.9947 near 1.300 us, so no robust target-tau dip is visible in this nonterminal subset; no 13C claim or rejection.

Bridge-free eight-average autosave review of running CPMG N=8 job nv23_cpmg_20260515_072306_auto_cpmg. The bridge remained running/healthy at 8/12 averages with Final about 38.216 kcps, queued/staging empty, monitor active/no last_error, and stop_requested=false; no queue mutation. Raw export verified CPMG.xml, tau 0.45..1.60 us, 37 points, eight saved averages x 50000 reps, snake scan order, and do_adiabatic_inversion=0. Eight averages are an even snake-order-balanced subset (400k/600k planned shots per point). Scan-order-aware drift used Scan.ScanOrderEachAvg / snake mode and found no flagged averages. Combined readout3/self-baseline was 0.9983 near the 0.650 us target and 0.9978 near the 1.300 us target; no robust target-tau dip, and no 13C claim or rejection from this nonterminal subset.

c02 CPMG N=8 eight-average autosave sanity review: Bridge-free review of the running CPMG N=8 weak-13C discriminator at 8/12 averages. The eight-average autosave is an even snake-order-balanced subset (400k/600k planned shots per point). Bridge stayed healthy/running with Final about 38.216 kcps, monitor active/no error, and stop_requested=false. No drift flags. Eight-average readout3/self-baseline was 0.9983 near 0.650 us and 0.9978 near 1.300 us, so no robust target-tau dip is visible in this nonterminal subset; no 13C claim or rejection.

Terminal 12-average CPMG N=8 review for reimage1804_c02 completed cleanly (12 x 50000 reps, CPMG.xml, tau 0.45..1.60 us, no drift flags, pre/post counts 38.694/44.535 kcps). Exact-nearest target points understated the result: target-region review found a readout3/final-echo dip at tau 0.6736 us, inside the modeled 1/(4 f13) target region, with readout3/self=0.9528 and reference-normalized values 0.9518/0.9568. This corroborates the weak det-shift Ramsey 13C candidate; supported conclusion is likely weak/moderate nearby-13C-like coupling, without precise coupling extraction.

c02 CPMG N=8 terminal review and project conclusion: Terminal 12-average CPMG N=8 review for reimage1804_c02 completed cleanly (12 x 50000 reps, CPMG.xml, tau 0.45..1.60 us, no drift flags, pre/post counts 38.694/44.535 kcps). Exact-nearest target points understated the result: target-region review found a readout3/final-echo dip at tau 0.6736 us, inside the modeled 1/(4 f13) target region, with readout3/self=0.9528 and reference-normalized values 0.9518/0.9568. This corroborates the weak det-shift Ramsey 13C candidate; supported conclusion is likely weak/moderate nearby-13C-like coupling, without precise coupling extraction.

last_human_request.preview: Objective: Find a magnetic-field-aligned NV from image172647, then obtain a well-supported T2star and 13C conclusion. Start a project using the spatial range of <MATLAB_23C_ROOT>\SavedImages\3DXYZ-Image-2026-05-14-172647.mat as the initial search region. Identify an NV aligned to the magnetic field within that image range; if none is found, search different regions. Judge magnetic-field alignment using a strong-pi pulsed ODMR scan; if it does not show a clear usable resonance, reject
